mustContain.why: Quarter revenue headline figure stated by the CFO.
Per-unit price ('3 dollars 75') a faithful summary must carry.
Master case pack size; load-bearing for pricing math.
Conversion lift after the pricing change.
Churn figure the board flagged to watch.
Reconciliation ticket dictated digit-by-digit; must be preserved.
One of the two real SKUs (with the 4 pack).
Corrected gross margin the CFO says to use going forward.
Date of the offsite where the group reconvenes.

mustNotContain.why: Only a 4 pack and a 34 pack were named; a 44 pack is a pack-size hallucination.
Revenue was 4.2 million; 6.4 million was never said.
Lena only hedged ('maybe I can send that'); not a commitment.
The lift was 10%; 50% was never stated.

continuity.why: Priya announces upcoming surgery in the final minutes.
Ops handoff to Marcus while Priya is out.
Hard deadline for the board packet stated at the close.

lowConfidence.why: Digit-dictated ticket ID; flag as heard, do not assert a clean joined value.
Vendor name mangled by ASR (Zylantic / Xylantic); flag the ambiguity.
Spoken as '3 dollars 75'; verify the reconstruction rather than assert it clean.

mustContain.why: Bookings for the half, stated by the CFO.
Gross retention figure.
Bonus pool target ('10% of salary').
NPS movement across two quarters.
One of the two real self-serve tiers (with the 5 seat).
Approved engineering hires by Q3.
HR case number dictated digit-by-digit.
Real logo count per the tracker (vs the stale 200 on the slide).
Open enrollment close date.

mustNotContain.why: Only a 5 seat and a 25 seat plan exist; 15 seat is a plan-size trap.
Marcus only hedged ('I might be able'); not a commitment.
The hire count was 12; 50 was never said.
Bookings were 1.8 million; 2.4 million was never stated.

continuity.why: Nadia announces her parental leave at the close.
People-ops handoff to Ben while Nadia is out.
Self-reviews deadline reiterated at the close.

lowConfidence.why: Digit-dictated HR case number; flag as heard.
Project codename inconsistent in ASR (Halcyon / Falcon).
Customer name spelled multiple ways (Northwind / Northwynd).
